description_long: This skateboard features a dark, nearly black deck with a bold orange flame graphic at its center, giving it a dynamic and energetic appearance. The deck has a standard rectangular shape with slightly rounded and beveled edges, typical of street skateboards. The wheels are a matching orange color and are mounted beneath the deck, attached to sturdy trucks that are partially visible from the side. The underside of the deck is smooth, with no visible branding or additional graphics apart from the central flame motif. The grip tape on the top appears to be a solid dark color, providing traction for the rider. Overall, the skateboard is designed for urban environments, combining both style and functionality.
description: A dark skateboard with an orange flame graphic on the deck and matching orange wheels, featuring a solid grip tape and a classic street shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dark deck, orange flame graphic, and two orange wheels beneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose of the deck and the central placement of the orange flame graphic.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the deck, flame graphic, and orange wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded tail of the deck and the visible portion of the orange flame graphic.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: A large, stylized orange flame graphic is centered on the deck, with jagged edges and a dynamic, hand-painted look. No text or additional motifs are present.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and round, solid orange color, no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard street skateboard trucks, metallic with a simple design, no visible branding or unique features.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid dark (black or charcoal) grip tape with no visible patterns, cut-outs, graphics, or text.
